mapper.select:
SELECT mgr_seq, analy_mgr_seq, layer_id, item_nm, min_val, max_val, ope_str, weight_val, impact_m
FROM xeus.bigdata_analy_weight
AND mgr_seq = #{mgrSeq}::numeric
AND analy_mgr_seq = #{analyMgrSeq}::numeric
AND layer_id = #{layerId}
AND item_nm = #{itemNm}
AND min_val = #{minVal}::numeric
AND max_val = #{maxVal}::numeric
AND ope_str = #{opeStr}
AND weight_val = #{weightVal}::numeric
AND impact_m = #{impactM}::numeric

SELECT count(*)
FROM xeus.bigdata_analy_weight
AND mgr_seq = #{mgrSeq}::numeric
AND analy_mgr_seq = #{analyMgrSeq}::numeric
AND layer_id = #{layerId}
AND item_nm = #{itemNm}
AND min_val = #{minVal}::numeric
AND max_val = #{maxVal}::numeric
AND ope_str = #{opeStr}
AND weight_val = #{weightVal}::numeric
AND impact_m = #{impactM}::numeric

CREATE TABLE xeus.bigdata_analy_weight ( mgr_seq bigserial, analy_mgr_seq numeric(32,0) NOT NULL, layer_id character varying(100) NOT NULL, item_nm character varying(100), min_val numeric(8,0), max_val numeric(8,0), weight_val numeric(10,4), impact_m numeric(8,0), CONSTRAINT bigdata_analy_weight_pk PRIMARY KEY (mgr_seq) );
CREATE INDEX bigdata_analy_weight_mgr_seq_idx ON xeus.bigdata_analy_weight USING btree (analy_mgr_seq,layer_id);
mapper.update: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS xeus.bigdata_analy_weight cascade;
